mapper.select: SELECT ts.trip_schedule_id, ts.trip_day_id AS oldTripDayId, td.trip_date AS oldTripDate, ts.attraction_no, ts.title, ts.memo, ts.sort_order, ts.created_by FROM trip_schedule ts JOIN trip_day td ON td.trip_day_id = ts.trip_day_id WHERE td.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY td.trip_date ASC, ts.sort_order ASC, ts.trip_schedule_id ASC

SELECT ts.trip_schedule_id AS tripScheduleId, ts.trip_day_id AS oldTripDayId, td.trip_date AS oldTripDate, ts.attraction_no AS attractionNo, ts.title AS title, ts.memo AS memo, ts.sort_order AS sortOrder, ts.created_by AS createdBy FROM trip_schedule ts JOIN trip_day td ON td.trip_day_id = ts.trip_day_id WHERE ts.trip_schedule_id = #{tripScheduleId} AND td.trip_id = #{tripId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO trip_schedule (trip_day_id, attraction_no, title, memo, sort_order, created_by) VALUES
( #{cmd.tripDayId}, #{cmd.attractionNo}, #{cmd.title}, #{cmd.memo}, #{cmd.sortOrder}, #{cmd.createdBy} )
INSERT INTO trip_schedule (trip_day_id, attraction_no, title, memo, sort_order, created_by ) VALUES (#{tripDayId}, #{attractionNo}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE trip_schedule SET memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE trip_schedule_id = #{tripScheduleId}
